candidate_definition_hints.text: The C++ REST SDK is a Microsoft project for cloud-based client-server communication in native code using a modern asynchronous C++ API design. This project aims to help C++ developers connect to and interact with services.
**The C++ REST SDK is in maintenance-only mode and we do not recommend its use in new projects.
